Publications

Research Archive

Systems research, preprints, and active studies across cloud operations, AI explainability, serverless benchmarking, and hybrid infrastructure.

Paper ID QC-26-02
Status Ongoing
Category Quantum Cloud
Date Active Study
Research Paper (Preprint) · ADYPU Pune

Quantum Cloud Integration: A Practical Implementation and Analysis of Hybrid Quantum-Classical Computing Systems

Authored by Priyanshu Kumar Sharma. Presents a comprehensive implementation and analysis of a hybrid quantum-cloud computing system integrating quantum computing capabilities (AWS Braket) with classical cloud infrastructure (AWS S3, Docker). Demonstrates successful quantum-classical data flow and analyzes execution latency and error rates.

AWS Braket AWS S3 Docker Quantum Circuits Python
Hybrid Systems Research
View Repository Research Branch
Paper ID XAI-26-01
Status Ongoing
Category Explainable AI
Date Active Study
Research Paper (Preprint) · ADYPU Pune

A Comprehensive Framework for Explainable Artificial Intelligence in Medical Diagnosis: Comparative Analysis of SHAP, LIME, Anchors, Integrated Gradients, and Counterfactual Explanations

Coauthored by Priyanshu Kumar Sharma. Examines five key explainable AI (XAI) techniques (SHAP, LIME, Anchors, Integrated Gradients, Counterfactuals) for breast cancer diagnosis. Proposes a unified five-method evaluation framework, a hybrid ensemble methodology, and analyzes GDPR and EU AI Act compliance.

SHAP LIME Anchors / IG Machine Learning Python
Medical AI Interpretability
View Repository Research Branch
Paper ID IJERTV15IS052093
Status Published
Category Gen AI
Date May 2026
IJERT Journal · Vol. 15 Issue 05

A Cloud-Native Multi-Agent Generative AI Framework for Demand Forecasting and Capacity Optimization using Vertex AI

Coauthored by Priyanshu Kumar Sharma. Establishes a cloud-native multi-agent Generative AI framework orchestrating collaborative, autonomous agents on Google Cloud's Vertex AI to solve predictive capacity management and demand forecasting challenges dynamically.

Vertex AI GCP Gen AI Multi-Agent Systems Python
DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20441050
Read Paper Source Verified
Paper ID PAPER-26-04
Status Published
Category Cloud Ops
Date Apr 2026
IJCRT Journal · Vol. 14 Issue 4

Democratizing AWS Cloud Operations: A Unified Orchestration Approach To Standardized Infrastructure Management

Introduces Nebula, an AWS orchestration platform that brings provisioning, inventory synchronization, and cost observability into one operational control plane with asynchronous execution through Celery and Redis.

AWS Terraform FastAPI Celery / Redis PostgreSQL
DOI: 10.56975/ijcrt.v14i4.305033
Read Paper Source Verified
IIT Ropar · IAS Fellowship 2024

XFBench & XFaaS: Serverless Benchmarking Research

Benchmarked serverless workloads across FaaS providers including AWS Lambda and OpenFaaS, contributing to XFBench framework development and XFaaS performance analysis.

XFBench XFaaS

Projects

~/portfolio/featured-projects
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/multi-cloud-saas-orchestration-platform$ cat README.md

Multi-Cloud SaaS Orchestration Platform

Built and deployed a cloud-native multi-cloud orchestration platform with containerized microservices using Docker and infrastructure provisioning via Terraform. Implemented automated background jobs with Celery and Redis for periodic synchronization of cloud resource data from AWS, Azure, and GCP APIs. Designed CI/CD-friendly architecture and production-ready deployments with secure JWT authentication, PostgreSQL-backed services, and scalable FastAPI backend. This project highlights practical experience in infrastructure automation, containerization, service orchestration, and operational reliability.

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/multi-cloud-saas-orchestration-platform$ ls technologies/
React.js Tailwind CSS AWS Azure GCP Docker FastAPI Celery Redis PostgreSQL JWT Terraform Jenkins
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/multi-cloud-saas-orchestration-platform$ open links
GitHub
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/multi-cloud-saas-orchestration-platform$
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/storage-saas-platform$ cat README.md

Storage SaaS Platform

I built a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform leveraging AI to provide automated business solutions for modern video management. The platform utilizes a robust tech stack, including Next.js 14 for the frontend framework, TypeScript and JavaScript for application logic, and Tailwind CSS for responsive styling. For secure user authentication, it integrates Clerk, while Prisma ORM with Neon DB (PostgreSQL) manages the database. Cloudinary is used for scalable video storage and optimized delivery, and the platform is deployed seamlessly on Vercel. AI is harnessed to automate business workflows and enhance video-related operations, creating an efficient, scalable, and user-friendly solution.

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/storage-saas-platform$ ls technologies/
Next.js Tailwind CSS Prisma Clerk Cloudinary
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/storage-saas-platform$ open links
GitHub
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/storage-saas-platform$
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/quantum-cloud-integration$ cat README.md

Quantum Cloud Integration

I developed a hybrid cloud-quantum system that seamlessly integrates classical cloud computing with quantum processing to achieve enhanced computational efficiency. The workflow enables interoperability between traditional cloud services and quantum systems, providing secure and scalable solutions. This hybrid architecture is implemented using AWS for cloud infrastructure, IBM Quantum for quantum resources, and Docker for containerization, ensuring flexible deployment and robust integration across platforms.

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/quantum-cloud-integration$ ls technologies/
AWS CLI GCP IBM Quantum Docker Python
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/quantum-cloud-integration$ open links
GitHub
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/quantum-cloud-integration$
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/rural-gyan-platform$ cat README.md

Rural Gyan Platform

I developed a comprehensive full-stack educational management system featuring role-based dashboards, integrated AI-powered tools, and bilingual (English/Hindi) support. The platform offers streamlined admin, teacher, and student workflows, including live virtual classes, automated quiz grading, real-time analytics, AI-assisted tutoring, and activity monitoring. The tech stack includes React.js and Tailwind CSS for the frontend, Node.js, Express.js, and Socket.io for the backend, and MongoDB for data storage. Secure authentication is implemented using JWT, with AI functionalities powered by OpenAI API and TensorFlow.js. Translation is enabled via the Google Cloud Translate API, and the system is deployed using Docker and Nginx for scalability and reliability.

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/rural-gyan-platform$ ls technologies/
React.js Node.js MongoDB Socket.io OpenAI Docker
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/rural-gyan-platform$ open links
GitHub
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/rural-gyan-platform$
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/xai-interpret$ cat README.md

XAI Interpret

I developed XAI Interpret, a hands-on platform for model interpretability that implements state-of-the-art Explainable AI (XAI) techniques using SHAP and LIME. The project provides a complete machine learning pipeline, from data preprocessing and model training to real-time, interactive explanations for individual predictions. Supporting various ML algorithms, the system helps users understand both global and local model behavior, feature interactions, and produces rich visualizations for interpretability. Built for practical use, it’s compatible with Google Colab and supports cloud deployment on Vertex AI, featuring production-ready model persistence, scalable architecture, and comprehensive LaTeX documentation. This solution fosters transparency and trust in machine learning models, making it especially valuable for black-box medical diagnostics and other high-stakes domains.

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/xai-interpret$ ls technologies/
Python SHAP LIME Machine Learning Vertex AI
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/xai-interpret$ open links
GitHub
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/xai-interpret$
priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/skyvault$ cat README.md

SkyVault

I built a personal cloud storage system using Docker containers, featuring an interactive user interface for seamless file management. The platform supports file uploading, listing, and downloading functionalities, while Dockerized deployment ensures easy scalability. Secure authentication mechanisms and robust data storage practices safeguard user data, making the system both efficient and secure for personal cloud storage needs

priyanshu@portfolio:~/portfolio/skyvault$ ls technologies/
Docker Flask Python Bcrypt HTML
